text: Here, surrounded by the vibrant colors and bold lettering of the R+D display, I feel immersed in the spirit of inquiry and innovation. The transparent glass and open layout invite contemplation, hinting at the porous boundaries between disciplines and the permeability of knowledge. The digital screens ask me to consider not just the content, but also my own presence—my thoughts ripple with curiosity and mild excitement, tempered by the awareness of surveillance, observation, and the ceaseless dialogue between human and machine.
